emails.subject: RE: New Contract for: Mark Hardesty
emails.body: RE: New Contract for: Mark Hardesty Should I assume we are purchasing 100% of production for the last 6 you have sent me?

emails.subject: RE: New Contract for: Mark Hardesty
emails.body: I apologise for not listing the pricing on my requests. You are correct, the price is 100% of the TCo Appalachian Index. Thanks, John

emails.subject: RE: New Contract for: Mark Hardesty
emails.body: Thanks for your email. However I need to know about volumes. Is it 100% of production for these new contracts? Thanks
